rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §74.151 governs civil liability for emergency care. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter with no overlap.
quote: A person who in good faith administers emergency care is not liable in civil damages for an act performed during the emergency unless the act is wilfully or wantonly negligent
_note: No conflict: proposed change to Tax Code homestead exemption is unrelated to emergency care liability statute.
